company.name: Revolution Medicines
company.subtitle: RAS(ON) platform · RASolute 302 PDAC readout H1 2026 · 5 Phase 3 trials · 3 BTDs

market.notes: PDAC ~$5-8B market, ~90% KRAS-driven. RASolute 302 (2L) readout H1 2026. RASolute 303 (1L) first patient dosed Apr 2026. RASolute 304 (adjuvant). BTD for 2L PDAC. Daraxonrasib is oral multi-selective RAS(ON) targeting G12X/G13X/Q61X.
NSCLC largest lung cancer subtype. ~25% KRAS-mutant. Daraxonrasib Phase 3 vs docetaxel in 2L+. Competitors: sotorasib (G12C only), adagrasib (G12C only) — daraxonrasib covers ALL RAS mutations.
G12D is the most common KRAS mutation in PDAC (~40%). Zoldonrasib BTD in NSCLC. Phase 1 plenary at AACR 2026. RASolute 305: zoldon + chemo vs chemo in 1L PDAC. First G12D-specific therapy.
Next-gen G12C inhibitor (RAS(ON) mechanism vs covalent). Differentiated from sotorasib/adagrasib. Phase 1/2 ongoing.
Expanding to cover all oncogenic RAS variants. G12V (RMC-5127 in clinic), Q61H, G13C in preclinical. Goal: cover entire RAS-addicted cancer universe.

mega_bear.narrative: RASolute 302 fails — RAS(ON) mechanism doesn't translate to OS benefit
events: ✗ RASolute 302 misses OS primary endpoint in 2L PDAC
✗ RAS(ON) mechanism shows tumor response but no survival benefit
✗ Competitive KRAS landscape crowds out (Mirati, Amgen next-gen)
→ $19B market cap collapses to cash floor (~$11/share)

bear.narrative: RASolute 302 modest — OS improvement but narrow label + slow uptake
events: ~ RASolute 302 shows modest OS benefit (HR 0.75-0.80)
✗ Narrow 2L PDAC label limits commercial potential
~ NSCLC and G12D programs advance but competitive pressure intense
→ Platform validated but commercial execution uncertain

base.narrative: PDAC franchise established + NSCLC expands TAM + G12D first-in-class
events: ✓ RASolute 302 positive — first targeted therapy to show OS in PDAC
✓ Accelerated Approval in 2L PDAC, full approval after confirmatory
✓ RASolute 303 1L PDAC enrolling well — combo data encouraging
~ G12D and NSCLC programs on track for 2027-28 readouts

bull.narrative: RAS franchise across PDAC + NSCLC + CRC — multi-billion blockbuster
events: ✓ RASolute 302 strong OS — new standard of care in PDAC
✓ 1L PDAC + adjuvant + NSCLC — $5B+ peak franchise
✓ Zoldonrasib first G12D therapy — massive unmet need
✓ Platform covers all major RAS mutations — competitive moat

psychedelic_bull.narrative: RAS(ON) = Keytruda of targeted therapy — Merck/Roche acquires at $200+
events: ✓ PDAC OS data transformative — paradigm shift in pancreatic cancer
✓ Pan-RAS franchise: PDAC + NSCLC + CRC + biliary = $10B+
✓ Resistance-breaking catalytic inhibitors extend durability
✓ Merck or Roche acquires for $40-60B to own entire RAS space

lastData.title: RASolute 303 first patient dosed + AACR 2026 upcoming
points: RASolute 303 (1L PDAC): first patient dosed Apr 2, 2026
RASolute 302 (2L PDAC): readout expected H1 2026 — THE catalyst
Zoldonrasib BTD granted for G12D NSCLC (Jan 2026)
9 presentations at AACR 2026 (Apr 17-22) — plenary for zoldon NSCLC
Stock at $95 vs peak $124 — market awaiting 302 data

nextCatalyst.title: RASolute 302 — daraxonrasib Phase 3 in 2L PDAC
thresholds: This is THE most anticipated oncology readout of 2026
If positive: first targeted therapy with OS benefit in PDAC
AACR 2026 (Apr 17-22): zoldonrasib G12D NSCLC plenary data

risks: RASolute 302 is the binary event — failure destroys the thesis
$19B market cap with zero revenue — entirely priced on Phase 3 hope
PDAC is notoriously hard — many targeted therapies have failed here
Competitive RAS landscape heating up (Mirati, BridgeBio, others)
5 concurrent Phase 3 trials = enormous cash burn
OS endpoint in PDAC is challenging — short baseline survival
Resistance mechanisms may limit durability of RAS(ON) inhibitors
Stock already 3x'd in 12 months — significant priced in
